meta.source: O*NET 28.0 Detailed Work Activities via ISCO-08 crosswalk
meta.note: Seed data for demo mode. Real data loaded from data/processed/ when available.

dwas.text: Test electronic equipment to ensure proper functioning
Inspect equipment to locate or identify electrical or mechanical problems
Explain technical information or instructions to customers
Order materials, supplies, or equipment for repairs
Document operational or maintenance activities
Manage multiple repair jobs to meet customer timelines
Greet customers and determine their needs and preferences
Estimate costs or prices of goods for customers
Assess stock levels and identify when restocking is needed
Record sales transactions and maintain daily accounts
Manage goods across multiple product lines or stalls
Negotiate prices with suppliers to control costs
Inspect garments or fabric for defects, stains, or damage
Consult with customers to understand garment specifications and preferences
Estimate fabric and material requirements and costs for orders
Follow pattern instructions and standard measurements to ensure quality
Schedule and prioritize multiple customer orders by deadline
Evaluate finished garments against customer specifications
Examine structures or sites to assess condition and identify problems
Calculate material quantities needed and estimate costs for a job
Communicate progress and issues to clients or site supervisors
Follow building specifications and standards during construction
Coordinate tasks across workers on a construction site
Check completed work for structural integrity and alignment
Consult with clients to understand desired hair style or treatment
Assess hair and scalp condition to determine appropriate treatment
Manage product inventory and control supply costs
Follow hygiene and sanitation procedures consistently between clients
Manage client appointments and walk-ins to minimize wait times
Evaluate completed style against client expectations
Test electrical systems and circuits to identify faults
Explain electrical problems and repair options to clients in plain terms
Estimate materials and labor costs before starting a job
Follow wiring standards and safety procedures on every installation
Coordinate multiple electrical jobs across different sites
Inspect completed electrical work against safety specifications
Inspect motorcycle for mechanical issues before trips
Communicate route, timing and fare clearly to passengers
Manage fuel and maintenance costs against daily earnings
Follow traffic rules and safety procedures consistently
Manage multiple delivery or passenger requests efficiently
Assess route conditions and adjust for safety or efficiency
Identify signs of plant disease, pest infestation, or nutrient deficiency
Communicate harvest yields and quality to buyers or aggregators
Estimate seed, fertilizer, and input costs against expected yield
Follow planting, irrigation, and harvesting schedules consistently
Coordinate labor and tasks across the farming season
Evaluate crop health and yield quality before harvest
Inspect wood or materials for defects that could affect the finished piece
Discuss design specifications and dimensions with clients
Estimate wood quantities and costs for custom orders
Follow joinery measurements and finishing standards throughout production
Manage multiple furniture orders at different stages simultaneously
Evaluate finished pieces for structural integrity and finish quality
Identify when food quality or freshness does not meet standard
Take and confirm customer orders accurately and courteously
Estimate daily ingredient quantities needed to minimize waste and cost
Follow food preparation, hygiene, and service standards consistently
Manage multiple customer orders simultaneously during peak hours
Assess taste, presentation, and temperature before serving food
